info.text: You can't water them unless you water the ground.

info.text: You can't water them unless you water the ground.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: They grow and change, but they always have one thing in mind.

info.text: They grow and change, but they always have one thing in mind.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: We need to water them and care for them.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: Seeds are watered and fertilized with time and patience.

info.text: Seeds are watered and fertilized with time and patience.

info.text: The plant grows as the mind expands, through time and thought.

info.text: It is unwise to neglect a plant longing to grow, just as it is unwise to neglect an idea that wants to be realized.

info.text: Freeform thinker draws itself the same way a plant grows from the earth.

info.text: Blooming flowers are like ideas, they grow and develop on their own.

info.text: Flowers and fruits come from seeds, a seemingly small act that makes tableaus of something larger.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: It's impossible to manipulate trees that have strong roots, just with ideas that have strong minds.

info.text: Free-flowing branches are more beautiful than a well-manicured tree, but a free-flowing mind is just as beautiful as a well-intentioned action.
